preview: Hey, we're launching a new DeFi protocol next month and looking for KOLs...
content: Hey, we're launching a new DeFi protocol next month and looking for KOLs to join our ambassador program. Would love to discuss a partnership — we offer token allocation + revenue share. Let me know if you're interested!

preview: Hi Sarah, interested in a sponsored post for our new staking platform...
content: Hi Sarah, interested in a sponsored post for our new staking platform. We're offering $500 per tweet. Please share your media kit if available.

preview: 🚀 100x guaranteed!! Join our telegram group now...
content: 🚀 100x guaranteed!! Join our telegram group now for exclusive alpha. Limited spots! Don't miss out on the next 100x gem!

preview: We're a VC fund focused on AI startups. Would love to collaborate...
content: We're a VC fund focused on AI startups and we think your audience aligns perfectly with our portfolio companies. Would love to discuss a long-term content partnership for 2024.

preview: Love your content! What's your take on the recent BTC halving...
content: Love your content! What's your take on the recent BTC halving and how it will affect altcoins? Would appreciate your analysis.

preview: We're organizing AI Safety Summit 2024 and would like to invite you as a speaker...
content: We're organizing AI Safety Summit 2024 and would like to invite you as a keynote speaker. The event will be held in San Francisco in September. We cover travel and accommodation.

preview: Hi Nina! We're a B2B SaaS tool and would love a product review...
content: Hi Nina! We're a B2B SaaS tool for startup founders and would love a product review or a thread from you. We can offer a 6-month free subscription + $300 fee.

preview: Follow back and I'll follow you! Let's grow together...
content: Follow back and I'll follow you! Let's grow together. Also check out my new NFT collection dropping this week. Use code YUKI for 10% off.
